formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} & a_{n , s - 1} - d_{n , s} \leq g_{s , s - 1}^{max} + M \left(2 - y_{n , s} - y_{n , s - 1}\right) \text{if} n = \overset{̃}{n} + 1 \text{and} s - 1 \in \mathcal{S}_{\overset{̃}{n}} \backslash \left(\mathcal{S}_{\overset{̃}{n} + 1} \cup \left\{\overset{̃}{s}\right\}\right) \\ & a_{n , s - 1} - d_{n , s} \leq g_{s , s - 1}^{max} + \tau^{\text{res}} - \tau^{\text{acc}} x_{n , s} - \tau^{\text{dec}} x_{n , s - 1} + M \left(2 - y_{n , s} - y_{n , s - 1}\right) \text{otherwise} \end{matrix}\right , \forall n \in \mathcal{N}_{r}^{\text{dn}} , s \in \mathcal{S} , s - 1 \in \mathcal{S} \backslash \mathcal{S}_{n} ,

formulas.latex: Z^{\text{deviation}} = \underset{n \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{up}} \cup \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{s \in \mathcal{S}}{\sum} \left(\left|a_{n , s} - \overset{̄}{a}_{n , s}\right| + \left|d_{n , s} - \overset{̄}{d}_{n , s}\right|\right) .

formulas.label: fd73
formulas.latex: Z^{\text{cancel}} = \underset{n \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{up}} \cup \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{s \in \mathcal{S}}{\sum} max \left\{1 - y_{n , s} , x_{n , s}\right\} .

formulas.latex: Z^{\text{variation}} = \underset{n \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{n^{' '} \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \underset{s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \left\{S\right\}}{\sum} p_{n^{'} , n , s} p_{n , n^{' '} , s} \left|d_{n^{'} , s} + d_{n^{' '} , s} - 2 d_{n , s}\right| + \underset{n \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{n^{' '} \in \mathcal{N}_{p}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \underset{s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \left\{1\right\}}{\sum} p_{n^{'} , n , s} p_{n , n^{' '} , s} \left|d_{n^{'} , s} + d_{n^{' '} , s} - 2 d_{n , s}\right| .

formulas.latex: \psi_{n , s}^{\text{end}} = \left\{\begin{matrix} & \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \xi_{n , n^{'} , s} + \beta_{n , s} & & \text{if} s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \cap \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} \text{and} n \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{up}} \\ & \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \xi_{n , n^{'} , s} + \beta_{n , s} & & \text{if} s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \cap \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} \text{and} n \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{dn}} \\ & \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{dn}}}{\sum} \xi_{n , n^{'} , s} & & \text{if} s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} \text{and} n \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{up}} \\ & \underset{n^{'} \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{up}}}{\sum} \xi_{n , n^{'} , s} & & \text{if} s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \backslash \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} \text{and} n \in \mathcal{N}^{\text{dn}} \\ & \beta_{n , s} & & \text{if} s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} \backslash \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \text{and} n \in \mathcal{N} \end{matrix}\right , \forall n \in \mathcal{N} , s \in \mathcal{S}^{\text{turn}} \cup \mathcal{S}^{\text{depot}} ,
